headline: Northern Trust Submits Exemptive Relief Applications for ETF Share Class Across Sponsored Multiple Series Trusts
summary: CHICAGO, June 08, 2026--Northern Trust seeks regulatory approval to offer ETF share classes alongside existing mutual fund share classes within two sponsored series trusts.

headline: Assessing Northern Trust (NTRS) Valuation After New Data Standards Role And Asset Servicing Leadership Shift
summary: Why Northern Trust Stock Is Back on Investors’ Radar Northern Trust (NTRS) has drawn fresh attention after joining the Open Semantic Interchange Financial Services Working Group and reshaping leadership in its Asset Servicing unit, moves that touch both data infrastructure and client coverage. See our latest analysis for Northern Trust.
